details.test: Task 1: Book standard boiler installation with earliest slot and pay after installation
Task 2: Add most efficient combi boiler under $2000 with 10+ year warranty to quote
Task 3: Select cheapest annual maintenance plan under $250 with 24/7 callout and monthly direct debit
Task 4: Check service coverage for SW1A 1AA and request callback for new boiler installation
Task 5: Start booking using offer with free smart thermostat and proceed to review
Task 6: Find cancellation FAQ and ask follow-up question via live chat
Task 7: Use heating cost calculator and open recommended boiler, then compare
Task 8: Find most recent 5-star boiler installation review and open boiler installation options
Task 9: Build installation package with combi boiler, smart thermostat, and system power flush
